changes.description: New NAV data: Feb 28, 2026. Class F-I = $32.28/share (+1.96% MoM). AUM: $207.0M. Distribution: $0.3399/share. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-02 (accno 0001213900-26-039308).
Distribution declared March 31, 2026: Class I = $0.3300/share. Record date March 31, 2026; payable on or about April 27, 2026. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-01.

April 2026 closing: $305.2M in new subscriptions at March 31, 2026 NAV (NAV TBD within 20 business days of April 1). Shares outstanding as of March 31, 2026: 119,118,454 Class I. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-04-07.
Credit facility increased: ACI Portfolio Aggregator SPV LLC revolving credit facility increased from $50M to $200M on March 25, 2026. Source: SEC 8-K filed 2026-03-31.
